span_mappings.nl_span: For every natural n, the one-bit positions of 2n are the one-bit positions of n shifted by one

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib04_bit_indices_even (n : Nat) : (2 * n).bitIndices = List.map (fun x => x + 1) n.bitIndices
natural_language_claim: For every natural n, the one-bit positions of 2n are the one-bit positions of n shifted by one.
